title: Fresh Seeds Bare Bones
description: A recreation of the bundled seed models that are present in Actions & Stuff but compatible with Bare Bones
body:
![Fresh Seeds Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3493339012c5eff4c7afd4a761ffe4473438860.png) ____ ![A Pack Made By J0intekk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/152caa02748686707441d482d1e55758bcd4e26c.png)
____ **This pack simply adds bundle models to seeds to make them look like they are in bundles, just like in Actions & Stuff! You can check out how the bundled seeds look like in the image gallery. You should also check out Ben's bundles (Adds 3D models to bundles, without Ben's bundles this pack wouldn't exist)** ____
I have got Ben's permission to use his models! ### Here's a picture of Ben agreeing to making this resource pack using his models ![A picture of Ben agreeing to making this resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2173508f2ff9f7daf759c015957167f30dd894d8.png)
____
Credits To [BennyMcCarthy_](https://modrinth.com/user/BennyMcCarthy_) for letting me use his bundle models\ This pack was inspired by [Oreville Studio's](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/oreville-studios/actions--stuff-1.5/61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795) Actions & Stuff
